validation_rules: Non-empty; must be a valid gene symbol (HGNC) or UniProt accession or ChEBI ID; max 100 chars
Non-empty; must be a valid gene symbol (HGNC) or UniProt accession or disease ontology ID (MONDO/DOID); max 100 chars
Numeric between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive; minimum 3 decimal places; must not be null for curated edges
Non-empty; valid CURIE format (prefix:identifier) e.g. HP:0001945 or GO:0008150; must resolve against latest ontology release
Must be one of: Homo sapiens|Mus musculus|Rattus norvegicus|Danio rerio|Caenorhabditis elegans; Latin binomial
Valid PubMed ID (PMID:XXXXXXXX) or DOI format (10.XXXX/...); max 100 chars; must be resolvable via PubMed API
